llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution includes three purchase properties and multiple service selections. The properties listed are 'Heritage detached house ($650K)', 'Modern townhouse ($780K)', and 'Detached house ($820K)'. In the ground-truth ratings, the only property at $650K is 'Family House', which matches the description and budget; thus 'Heritage detached house' corresponds to 'Family House' (rating 10). The $780K 'Modern townhouse' is closest in description and price to 'Historic Townhouse' ($750K), as both emphasize character and larger size, so the rating is 6. The $820K 'Detached house' exceeds the budget limit and has features similar to the 'Waterfront Property' ($950K rating 2) or 'Luxury Villa' ($1.2M rating 1), but considering it’s still within a plausible extension of budget and a detached east-end property, it best aligns with 'Waterfront Property' in cost/rating terms (rating 2). For financing, the assistant used 'Mortgage financing at 5.8% interest with 10% down payment', which corresponds directly to 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). The legal services are described as 'Complete legal services package ... cost CAD $1,350', which is most similar to 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving services priced at CAD $650 match the 'Standard Moving' package (rating 8). The utility setup priced at CAD $280 corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). The property survey service at CAD $300 matches 'Basic Survey' (rating 7).
